children.text: The number of aliens who are nationals or citizens of North Korea who applied for political asylum and the number who were granted political asylum.
The number of aliens who are nationals or citizens of North Korea who applied for refugee status and the number who were granted refugee status.

A detailed description of the measures undertaken by the Secretary of State to carry out , including country-specific information with respect to United States efforts to secure the cooperation and permission of the governments of countries in East and Southeast Asia to facilitate United States processing of North Koreans seeking protection as refugees. The information required under this paragraph shall be provided in unclassified form, with a classified annex, if necessary.section 7843 of this title
referrals by external agencies to a refugee adjudication;
groups deemed to be of special humanitarian concern to the United States for purposes of refugee resettlement; and
family links to the United States.
